summary: Frontend-only testing for iteration 6: verified 3 new legal pages (/kundavtal, /nojd-kundgaranti, /integritetspolicy), footer links with correct data-testids, shared Navbar+Footer on legal pages, navbar logo back-to-home, and regression checks for home, booking form, and admin login. All 42 frontend assertions passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Integritetspolicy.jsx has an additional unnumbered intro section 'Behandling av personuppgifter' before sections 1–14. Acceptable, but if strict numbering 1–14 only is desired, consider folding intro into section 1.
Footer Admin link (text-slate-400) has low contrast on white background; consider darker shade for accessibility. Not a bug per request.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iteration_6 verified: footer testids (footer-faq-link, footer-kundavtal-link, footer-nojdkundgaranti-link, footer-gdpr-link, footer-admin-link); /kundavtal h1='Bokningsvillkor' with 3 sections + email; /nojd-kundgaranti h1='Nöjd kundgaranti för din trygghet' with 3 chips, 2 headings, 3 numbered steps; /integritetspolicy h1='Integritetspolicy GDPR' contains sections 1–14, no 'alvisstad.se', uses purenorthstad.se. Navbar logo back to '/' works. Admin login via testids admin-email/admin-password/admin-login-submit, lands on admin panel with Bokningar+Omdömen tabs.
